# Plant pigments attract animals

## Short Teaching Summary
Plant pigments attract animals: Carotenoids found in fruit, such as lycopene (red of tomato), zeaxanthin (yellow of corn seeds), or β-carotene (orange of an orange peel), are used as advertisements to attract seed dispersers. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
